evidence.scientific_clarity: All four panels (pipeline diagram, ablation bars, training curves, 5x5 heatmap) match the brief exactly; Encode→Reason→Decode with attention/memory/skill-routing modules is clearly depicted.
evidence.typography: No pdf.fonttype=42 set anywhere in script; pdffonts confirms Type 3 DejaVuSans-Bold/Oblique/Regular — text is not editable; DejaVu Sans is the matplotlib default, explicitly flagged in brief hints.
evidence.palette: RdYlGn colormap on the heatmap (Panel D) is not colorblind-safe — fails red-green colorblindness; bar/line colors (blue, orange, gray) are reasonable but green/red are used directionally in heatmap without CB-safe alternative.
evidence.layout_density: gridspec(2,3,width_ratios=[2,1,1]) with D spanning full bottom row matches brief; hspace/wspace tuned; Panel A conceptual diagram fills space adequately; no overlapping labels observed.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Panel labels A–D bold sans-serif upper-left as required; caption numerics match figure; legend inside Panel C is clean; however RdYlGn colormap and non-selectable PDF text would draw Reviewer 2 comments.
evidence.vector_fidelity: pdffonts reports all fonts as Type 3 (not Type 1/TrueType); text is rendered as paths/bitmaps, not selectable; script never sets matplotlib.rcParams['pdf.fonttype'] = 42.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf (47K), figure.png (129K), caption.tex (714B), gen_figure.py (6.4K) all present and non-trivial; bonus figure.svg also generated.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption provides specific numerical claims for every panel: 64.7% full-model accuracy, 4.2–9.6 pp ablation degradation, 30k training steps, score range 0.04–0.99 with high performance at S3–S4 columns.

overall_strengths: Complete file deliverables with all four panels faithfully implementing the brief's gridspec layout and scientific content.
Caption is quantitatively rich with specific numerical findings for each panel, making it immediately useful for a paper submission.
overall_weaknesses: No pdf.fonttype=42 (or svg.fonttype=0) set — PDF text is Type 3 (non-selectable bitmapped paths), failing both typography and vector fidelity requirements.
RdYlGn heatmap colormap is not colorblind-safe and the default DejaVu Sans font was not replaced with a publication-quality alternative.
